name: PagerDuty
description: Incident management and on-call routing platform. Create incidents, list on-call users, manage escalation policies, and query services and teams.

integration_id_config.description: Unique identifier for this PagerDuty integration instance

api_token.description: PagerDuty REST API v2 token (General Access or User Token)

verify_ssl.description: Verify SSL certificates for API connections

actions.name: Health Check
actions.description: Verify API connectivity and token validity by querying a single incident

actions.name: List Teams
actions.description: Get list of teams configured on PagerDuty

actions.name: List Oncalls
actions.description: Get list of on-call entries on PagerDuty

actions.name: List Services
actions.description: Get list of available services on PagerDuty, optionally filtered by team IDs

team_ids.description: Comma-separated list of team IDs to filter by

actions.name: List Users
actions.description: Get list of users on PagerDuty, optionally filtered by team IDs

team_ids.description: Comma-separated list of team IDs to filter by

actions.name: List Escalation Policies
actions.description: Get list of escalation policies on PagerDuty, optionally filtered by user IDs and/or team IDs

user_ids.description: Comma-separated list of user IDs to filter by

team_ids.description: Comma-separated list of team IDs to filter by

actions.name: Create Incident
actions.description: Create an incident on PagerDuty with optional escalation policy or user assignment

description.description: Description / body details of the incident

service_id.description: ID of the impacted PagerDuty service

email.description: Email address of the user creating the incident (used in From header)

escalation_id.description: ID of escalation policy to use (optional)

assignee_id.description: ID of user to assign incident to (optional)

actions.name: Get Oncall User
actions.description: Get list of on-call users for a specific escalation policy with full user details

escalation_id.description: ID of escalation policy to look up on-call users for

actions.name: Get User Info
actions.description: Get detailed information about a specific PagerDuty user by user ID

user_id.description: PagerDuty user ID to look up
